targets.expr: sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_gateway_http_requests_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "gateway-api", "job", ".*")) or sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_agent_runtime_http_requests_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "agent-runtime", "job", ".*")) or sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_tool_runtime_http_requests_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "tool-runtime", "job", ".*"))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service, route) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_gateway_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]), "service", "gateway-api", "job", ".*"))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service, route) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_agent_runtime_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]), "service", "agent-runtime", "job", ".*"))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service, route) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_tool_runtime_http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[$__rate_interval]), "service", "tool-runtime", "job", ".*")))

sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_gateway_http_errors_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "gateway-api", "job", ".*")) or sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_agent_runtime_http_errors_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "agent-runtime", "job", ".*")) or sum by (service, status_class) (label_replace(rate(aegisflow_tool_runtime_http_errors_total[$__rate_interval]), "service", "tool-runtime", "job", ".*"))

options.content:
Use the provisioned Jaeger datasource in Explore to inspect cross-service traces. Local Jaeger UI is available at http://localhost:16686.

Keep trace search scoped to service names, operation names, correlation IDs, or workflow IDs. Do not add borrower-specific values as metric labels.
